title: Hand Hygiene Science
script_summary: Exploring the science behind proper hand hygiene.

segments.voiceover: Science has a clearer story about hand hygiene than social media does.
Most germs thrive on our hands. But how we wash them matters.
Simply running them under water? Not enough! You need soap.
Studies show washing for 20 seconds removes 99% of germs. So sing your favorite tune!
Neglecting this can lead to illness, especially for the vulnerable. It’s simple but vital.
So, wash your hands regularly. Stay safe and share this knowledge!
